docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $563.00 FILED BY SPECK CAB CO. DBA: ARROW CAB CO AS TO DEFENDANT KALIL, ANTONIOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO. DBA: ARROW CAB CO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KALIL, ANTONIOS JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFENDANT AS THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR THE ACCIDENT BY A PROPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
